summary: Completed comprehensive testing of K&N Import Export application after Cloudinary to Supabase migration. All admin authentication working perfectly with 3 hardcoded accounts. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend fully operational with complete admin dashboard functionality.

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Returns gallery assets with tag filtering
✅ Working - Successfully creates requests with proper reference IDs
✅ Working - All 3 admin accounts authenticate correctly (admin1, admin2, masteradmin)
✅ Working - Protected endpoint returns inventory with auth

integration_issues.issue: API calls through localhost:3000 return HTML instead of JSON due to static file server not proxying
integration_issues.solution: Use public URL for testing - all functionality works correctly via public endpoint

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
All public endpoints working (inventory, media, hero-images, gallery, requests)
Invalid credentials properly rejected with 'Invalid credentials' error
Admin dashboard displays user info in sidebar (username and role)
Inventory tab allows adding new items with proper form validation
Media tab shows upload form with category and tag dropdowns
Logout functionality works correctly and redirects to login
Homepage loads with hero slideshow featuring 6 pagination dots
Hero slideshow has proper navigation controls (prev/next, play/pause)
All main navigation sections accessible (Availability, Reserve, Quality, Contact)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all admin functionality and homepage working via public URL)
